title: Every Block Drop Is Random
description: A full randomizer datapack where every block drops a random item. Works across all versions — check downloads or changelogs for the exact pack_format you need.
body:
Welcome to Random Drops, the datapack that twists your Minecraft world into pure chaos 🤣
Every block you break drops a completely random item — Netherite? Bread? A music disc? Who knows bro.

Perfect for:

challenge worlds,
YouTube videos,
just pure fun

Lightweight, lag-free & works on servers too.

✨ FEATURES

Every block drops a randomized item,
Updated for all Minecraft versions (1.19 → 1.21+),
Clean loot-table only, zero lag,
Great for survival challenges,
Super easy to install

🔽 DOWNLOADS (Pack Formats)

All version files are included inside the “Downloads” section + “Changelogs”.

Included versions:

1.19.X - 1.21.X
Check Changelogs for detailed version notes.
